python3 << 'PYEOF'
import json
# Search Mar 25 articles for remaining questions
keywords = {
    'england': 'England', 'england goal': 'England', 'england match': 'England',
    'premier league israel': 'Israeli PL', 'israeli footballer': 'Israeli PL',
    'iran air raid': 'Iran city', 'iran residential': 'Iran city', 'iran killed house': 'Iran city',
    'paris bank bomb': 'Paris bank', 'telegram recruit': 'Paris bank',
    'abu dhabi damage': 'Abu Dhabi', 'adnoc iran': 'Abu Dhabi',
    'southern lebanon kill': 'Lebanon', 'southern lebanon strike': 'Lebanon',
    'sudan aid': 'Sudan', 'sudan humanitarian': 'Sudan',
    'hezbollah attack area': 'armed group', 'armed group missile': 'armed group',
    'jerusalem worship': 'Jerusalem', 'worship all religion': 'Jerusalem',
    'iran raid plant': 'Iran raid', 'iran attack plant': 'Iran raid',
}
with open('articles/2026/03/25/articles.jsonl','r') as f:
    for line in f:
        a = json.loads(line)
        title = (a.get('title') or '').lower()
        content = (a.get('content') or '')[:1000].lower()
        for kw, label in keywords.items():
            if kw in title:
                print(f'[{label}] {a["title"][:120]}')
                break

python3 << 'PYEOF'
import json
# Search more broadly for content with key terms
with open('articles/2026/03/25/articles.jsonl','r') as f:
    for line in f:
        a = json.loads(line)
        content = (a.get('content') or '')[:5000].lower()
        title = (a.get('title') or '').lower()
        # Search for ADNOC, Abu Dhabi company damage 
        if 'abu dhabi' in content and ('damage' in content or 'struck' in content or 'missile' in content):
            if 'iran' in content:
                print(f'[Abu Dhabi] {a["title"][:120]}')
                idx = content.find('abu dhabi')
                print(content[max(0,idx-100):idx+300])
                print('===')
